npc_editor.npc_browser_desc: Nearby NPC editor. Cached in player tempdata for this session.
npc_editor.name: Name
npc_editor.no_nearby_npcs: No nearby NPCs cached in range.
npc_editor.refresh_title: Refresh NPC cache and script state.
npc_editor.admin_title: Open admin access and keybind settings.
npc_editor.admin_not_registered: Main admin is not registered yet.
npc_editor.dce_title: Switch into dcE mode for dc_lib and JSON pairing.
npc_editor.dce_confirm:
dcE mode locks the regular script list and switches this editor into DC pairing mode.

Move to dcE mode?
npc_editor.general_mode_confirm:
Switch this NPC to General mode?

This clears the NPC Scripts, ScriptList, and disables ScriptEnabled. Continue?
npc_editor.dce_mode_confirm:
Switch this NPC to DCE mode?

This clears the NPC Scripts, ScriptList, and disables ScriptEnabled. dc_lib scripts are applied later from DC Editor Hub. Continue?
npc_editor.select_npc_details: Select an NPC to view its details.
npc_editor.title: Title
npc_editor.open_script_tab_hint: Open the Script tab to load data from the cached NPC object.
npc_editor.general_style_title: Switch back to regular CNPC script editing.
npc_editor.style_desc_general: general = regular CNPC Script and ScriptList editing mode.
npc_editor.style_desc_dce_warning: dcE = Warning: DC lib scripts and JSON pairing mode.
npc_editor.style_desc_dce_locked: dcE = Dochi locked. Update only through this NPC Editor dcE panel.
npc_editor.apply_writes_hint: Apply writes Scripts and ScriptEnabled using the cached nearby NPC reference.
npc_editor.choose_file_placeholder: Choose a file from the browser
npc_editor.dc_pick_entry: Pick an entry from the list. Details open in a side panel.
npc_editor.dc_requirements_note: Only entries whose required JS and HTML files exist can be applied.
npc_editor.installable_scripts_desc: Choose one entry. Disabled entries show the missing requirement directly in the list.
npc_editor.select_script_json_paths: Select a script to load matching JSON paths.
npc_editor.no_json_required: This entry does not require JSON.
npc_editor.general_convert_confirm:
Adding other scripts may cause errors. Please be careful.

Convert this NPC to a regular script NPC?
npc_editor.script_style_changed: Script style changed to {value}. Press Apply to save.
